message:
chore(repo): ignore AI agent session summaries

Add *_SUMMARY.md pattern to .gitignore to prevent accidental commits
of ephemeral AI agent work logs. These files document iterative code
review sessions but are redundant with the actual commit history and
don't belong in the permanent project documentation.

Deleted 24 session summary files:
- SECOND_ROUND through FIFTEENTH_ROUND summaries (14 files)
- Topic-specific summaries: CRITICAL_FIXES, DEEP_DIVE, DEEP_REVIEW,
  EXPLORATION, EXPLORATION_AND_FIXES, UI_UX_POLISH, UI_UX_REVIEW,
  SIMULATION_REVIEW, FINAL_ROUND, FINAL_SANITY_CHECK,
  FINAL_SIMULATION_REVIEW (10 files)

The code changes described in these summaries are preserved in their
respective commits (f467bf8, 6e5a7f0, 6e7363c, etc.).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -26,6 +26,9 @@ test-*.ts
 phage_illustrations/
 a.out
 
+# AI agent session summaries (ephemeral work logs)
+*_SUMMARY.md
+
 # Generated database (root level only, web public db is tracked for deployment)
 /phage.db
 !packages/web/public/phage.db
